name: Ryman Hospitality Properties, Inc.
business: Ryman Hospitality Properties is a self-advised REIT that owns upscale group-oriented destination hotels and entertainment assets. The company's Hospitality segment includes Gaylord Hotels and JW Marriott resorts offering meeting, convention, and lodging services, while its Entertainment segment features live music venues, themed bars, and media properties. The primary customer base comprises large group meeting planners and convention attendees in the United States.

exposures.sentence: We and our third-party hotel manager rely on information technology systems, including networks and the Internet, to process, transmit, and store electronic information, and to manage or support a variety of business processes, including financial transactions and records, personal identifying information, reservations, billing and operating data.

catalysts.sentence: We are currently renovating a location in Las Vegas, Nevada for an additional Category 10 on the Las Vegas strip that we anticipate to open in late 2026.

catalysts.event: Opening of Category 10 at Universal Orlando Resort's CityWalk
catalysts.sentence: We recently announced the development of a third location located at Universal Orlando Resort's CityWalk anticipated to open in late 2027.
In January 2026, OEG began managing the Ascend Amphitheater, a 6,800-seat amphitheater in downtown Nashville, under an initial ten-year management agreement.
We expect OEG to begin managing the CCNB Amphitheatre outside of Greenville, South Carolina in February 2026.
